paragraphs: Good momentum — overdue count is down to 62. Credit to Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) — cleared all overdue.

118 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **52 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 29 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$37,099 in payments going out this week** across 20 tasks — make sure funds are available. $11,565 expected in from 2 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Ginger Brown and Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — make sure resources are lined up.
